text: wicker park or mine for friday tacos? you owe me an elote
big star. 6:30. i drove the el today, so i'm walking, which means i'll be 8 min late.
decent verdict? you've been radio silent
dad — sunday 2pm works. tell aunt viv to dial in on time this round.
got it son. talk soon. your mother is baking again.
tell mom the cookies survived two days. ration the next batch.
calvin honey — cookies in the mail, two batches, the kind you don't admit you like
mom you're an angel. i'll call dad sunday.
are you eating? running too much? send me a picture.
calvin — move our wed 1:1 to 2:30, judge schwartz needs the room. rhonda has the binder.
2:30 confirmed.
good prep on the hicks motion. keep that energy for trial #1.
espresso bar daley, 8:30 friday. hicks read.
in. don't be late or i'll drink yours.
you did. respect.
thurs tempo — out, shift swap. sunday 9am still?
yes, 9 at the bean. coffee after.
8 miles felt criminal. needed it.
birthday card mailed sweetheart. don't peek before oct 15.
aunt viv — appreciated. naomi says call her.
dr. leong — knee held through 12mi pacers long. no tracking pain.
good. keep the strength block. flag any patella catch immediately.
saturday — montrose 7am, 12mi, hm pace. pace group 7:30 has your name.
in. cozy corner after, brunch is on amara.
she says no. she also says you're 8:12 avg, which is good news for nov 1.
rhonda — court paks ready for trial #2? need them by friday eod.
on it. exhibits printed, witness binders next. interpreter request was confirmed for the two misdemeanors.
you're the only reason this office works. coffee tomorrow on me.
saturday brunch — usual table for 2 at 9:30?
Confirmed! Calvin, your reservation Sat 9:30 AM for 2 is held. Veggie omelet on the prep list.
dr. okonkwo — annual is on the books for next january. iron panel still on the order?
yes — fasting CBC + ferritin queued. keep on the daily 325mg.
big star — 2 at 6:30 friday, bar seating if open.
got you Calvin — bar seats reserved 6:30. al pastor on standby.
fitted for new brooks, target oct 22 evening. last year's pair retiring.
booked Calvin — 6pm slot oct 22. ghost 16 or glycerin 21 on the wall in your size.
cba cle committee — confirming i'm running the panel-2 slot on the nov 12 agenda.
confirmed Calvin. agenda draft circulating monday. bring two slide pulls on indigent defense funding.
carpls — keeping me on saturday oct 31 intake. 10-1 same as last quarter.
you're in Calvin. spanish-language intake spike expected — your conversational helps. thank you.
